name: OverlayModelEvents
summary: Event class to allow the user to subscribe for OverlayModel events.

constructors.name: OverlayModelEvents
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OverlayModelEvents class

events.name: OverlayModelCollectionChanged
events.summary: The OverlayModelCollectionChanged event is raised when an overlay model is changed (added/updated/removed).
